new_opportunities.name: Decentralize AI Hackathon
new_opportunities.deadline: Rolling — two-round competition, no fixed deadline found (launched ~Jun 2, 2026)
new_opportunities.prize: $51,750+ (Nosana compute credits $41,750, Arweave storage $2,500, MEXC prizes)
new_opportunities.fit_reason: Nosana is Solana-native — our Solana stack is directly applicable. AI infrastructure focus aligns with agent economy. Decentralized compute = where agents run. Can submit existing work or concept-stage proposals. Nosana GPU credits useful for training.
new_opportunities.barrier: None — open to all, multiple submissions allowed

new_opportunities.name: BNB Hack: AI Trading Agent Edition
new_opportunities.source: DoraHacks — BNB Chain × CoinMarketCap × Trust Wallet
new_opportunities.prize: $36,000 USD + API credits + Claude API compute + Trust Wallet listing
new_opportunities.fit_reason: AI trading agents = Trade Roast core concept. BNB Agent SDK already in our queue. BSC testnet via MegaFuel already configured. Claude API credits as bonus. Two clear tracks — trading agent or signal/data agent. Strong alignment with DeFi + AI agent stack.
new_opportunities.barrier: None — open registration, 3 weeks to build
new_opportunities.status: NEW — not in tracker (note: distinct from BNB Agent SDK which is already tracked)

new_opportunities.name: CROO Agent Hackathon
new_opportunities.fit_reason: A2A composability and agent commerce align with agent economy vision. But CROO is a new/unproven protocol — limited ecosystem value. Small prize pool. Previously filtered as 'too deadline' but actually has 5 weeks. Marginal fit.

new_opportunities.name: QVAC Hackathon I - Unleash Edge AI
new_opportunities.fit_reason: Privacy and edge AI are tangentially related to our agent stack. Could position agent deployment at the edge. But not core crypto/DeFi focus. Small prize. Moderate learning value for privacy-preserving agent deployment.

urgent_deadlines.name: BNB Hack: AI Trading Agent
urgent_deadlines.action: NEW — evaluate for Trade Roast angle

recommendations: 1. BNB Hack: AI Trading Agent — STRONG NEW FIND. $36K, AI trading agents = Trade Roast core. BSC already configured. 3 weeks to build. Evaluate immediately.
2. Decentralize AI Hackathon — NEW FIND. $51K, Nosana (Solana-native) compute credits. Open infrastructure focus. Can submit existing work. Rolling deadline.
3. Sui Overflow — BIGGEST PRIZE POOL ($500K+). Already tracked but URGENT: verify registration NOW. 14 days left. If registered, this should be top priority.
4. CROO Agent Hackathon — RE-OPENED. Was filtered as 'too late' but deadline is Jul 11. $10K, A2A agent commerce. Lower priority but viable.
5. QVAC Edge AI — MODERATE. $21K, privacy + edge AI. Not core stack but learning opportunity. Skip unless bandwidth allows.
